news.title: ‘Doesn’t make sense to hold on to a combustion engine’: used EV prices rise as Australia’s fuel crisis hits
news.snippet: When a used vehicle rolls into a car yard, the usual trajectory for its price tag is down if it lingers too long. That is the (almost) iron law of the...

news.title: ‘I Didn’t Do My Research’: Woman Buys Used Tesla. 3 Days Later, She Gets A $16,000 Repair Bill
news.snippet: With gas prices skyrocketing, many drivers may find themselves considering buying an EV. One woman recently purchased a Tesla Model S to save money…

news.title: Sky News Australia. . Sky News host Jaimee Rogers weighs in on “one of the largest energy shocks” in modern history as the fuel crisis deepens.
Car Yards Empty As EV Sales Surge in Australia
news.snippet: Rising fuel costs and uncertainly of supply have accelerated Australia's transition to electric vehicles, emptying out some dealers.

news.title: Fuel prices are driving more Australians to EVs ‑ and secondhand cars are in high demand
news.snippet: Manufacturer order books are filling up, EV subscription services are full and wait times have blown out to months for popular models.
